response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive leadership in software development, architecture, and team mentorship across top-tier companies like Google and Meta, with a strong foundation in open-source technologies and modern tech stacks. However, his career lacks explicit IT consulting experience, strategic client-facing leadership, and UML modeling depth. His German proficiency is also below the required C1 level, which may hinder client interactions.
strengths: Proven track record in leading high-performance development teams at Google and Meta
Strong expertise in open-source technologies, Linux, and modern tech stacks (Node.js, TypeScript, Dlang)
Demonstrated ability to architect scalable systems and mentor teams in Agile/TDD methodologies
concerns: No direct experience in IT consulting or client-facing leadership roles
German language skills are only at a basic level (not meeting C1 requirement)
Lack of explicit UML modeling or requirements management experience in the resume
